title: Prefer 'withMethodBody' over 'withMethod' in ClassBuilder
description: Using 'ClassBuilder.withMethodBody' instead of 'ClassBuilder.withMethod' ensures that method bodies are defined explicitly, improving code clarity and maintainability. This practice helps prevent errors and makes the intent of the code more obvious to readers.
recommendation: Refactor code to use 'withMethodBody' when defining methods in ClassBuilder instead of the generic 'withMethod'.

checks.message: Refactor code to use 'withMethodBody' when defining methods in ClassBuilder instead of the generic 'withMethod'.
